footer.about_text: One of the 100 best hotels in Ukraine. A cozy complex with its own park, bowling, and Poirot restaurant.
footer.author: Dmytro Demchenko

home.about_p1: Gala Hotel began its operation in 2002. Since then, we have grown from opening the main building to creating a large-scale infrastructure with restaurants, a bowling club, and professional courts.
home.about_p2: In 2011, our hotel entered the list of the 100 best hotels in Ukraine, confirming high service levels and contribution to city development.

hero.title: Your Cozy Retreat in the Heart of Kamianets-Podilskyi
hero.subtitle: Gala Hotel — a blend of modern comfort, fine dining, and active leisure for the whole family.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: We offer a full range of services for your comfortable rest, recovery and entertainment.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Fine dining at Poirot and Bellagio restaurants. Signature dishes and cozy atmosphere.

leisure.title: Leisure
leisure.description: Galactica bowling club, tennis courts, shooting range, and children's attractions for active leisure.

health.title: Wellness
health.description: Own mineral water well 'Naftusia', sauna, and a large park area for walks.

conferences.title: Conferences
conferences.description: Professional conference hall for 80 people with all necessary equipment for business events.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.description: Choose the perfect option for your stay. From cozy standards to luxury apartments.

hero.title: About Gala Hotel
hero.description: History, achievements, and a full range of services of one of Ukraine's best hotels.

history.title: Our History
history.description: Gala Hotel Complex is a combination of many years of hospitality experience and continuous infrastructure development.

events.2002: Gala Hotel Complex began its operation.
events.2004: Opening of the main hotel building.
events.2008: Galactica Bowling Club and Poirot Restaurant started operating.
events.2011: Entering the list of the 100 best hotels in Ukraine.

stats.title: Room Inventory
stats.description: Today the complex operates as a single entity with a wide range of basic and additional services. The complex includes 4 buildings and 68 comfortable rooms of various categories.

rules.title: Check-in Rules
rules.description: Check-in is based on identity documents. The hotel has single, double, triple rooms. Quadruple accommodation for families is also possible.

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.footer: Room booking is free. We accept cash, cards, and bank transfers.

hero.title: Contacts
hero.description: We are always ready to answer your questions and help with booking. Contact us in any convenient way.

rules_cta.title: Stay Rules
rules_cta.description: Learn about the order of stay, services, and entertainment in our hotel.

form.title: Message Us
form.success_alert: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will contact you soon.

hero.title: Elegance and Comfort
hero.description: Choose your perfect accommodation. Each of our rooms is created to make you feel at home.

testimonial.text: "Incredible hotel! The Luxury room exceeded all expectations. Breakfast was delicious, and the staff was incredibly friendly."
testimonial.author: Anna Melnyk

standard.title: Standard
standard.description: Classic room with all amenities. Breakfast is included in the price.
standard.longDescription: Comfortable room of 15 m², ideal for single, double or triple accommodation. Breakfast is included (choice from the menu from 08:00 to 11:00). Breakfasts are served at the Poirot restaurant. During festival and holiday days, the standard rate changes. Please check room prices with the administrator!

standard_plus.title: Standard Plus
standard_plus.description: Improved room with extra space and updated interior.
standard_plus.longDescription: Comfortable room of 21 m², ideal for up to 4 persons. Breakfast is included (choice from the menu from 08:00 to 11:00). Breakfasts are served at the Poirot restaurant. During festival and holiday days, the standard rate changes. Please check room prices with the administrator!

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.description: Spacious two-room suite with private entrance, ideal for family holidays.
apartments.longDescription: Spacious two-room suite of 40 m² with private entrance, comfortably accommodating a whole family. Breakfast is included (choice from the menu from 08:00 to 11:00). Breakfasts are served at the Poirot restaurant. During festival and holiday days, the standard rate changes. Please check room prices with the administrator!

eco.title: ECO Room
eco.description: Budget and eco-friendly option for groups or large families.
eco.longDescription: Modern eco-rooms equipped with everything necessary for a comfortable stay. The room has two bunk beds. Breakfast is included (choice from the menu from 08:00 to 11:00). Breakfasts are served at the Poirot restaurant. During festival and holiday days, the standard rate changes. Please check room prices with the administrator!

hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: We offer everything needed for your comfort and entertainment. Feel hospitality and quality service in every detail of your vacation.

restaurant_poirot.title: Poirot Restaurant
restaurant_poirot.description: European, Mediterranean, and Ukrainian cuisines in a sophisticated atmosphere.
restaurant_poirot.longDescription: Our main restaurant offers a wide range of dishes to satisfy the most demanding gourmets. You can choose a cozy hall, summer terrace, or private gazebos in our park for private meetings.

leisure_center.title: Leisure and Entertainment
leisure_center.description: Variety of opportunities for active leisure and relaxation.
leisure_center.longDescription: We offer our guests a world of entertainment on 1.2 hectares. From the drive of Galactica bowling club and tennis court to wellness in the sauna or at our own mineral water well.

restaurant_bellagio.title: Bellagio Club-Restaurant
restaurant_bellagio.description: Exquisite leisure and entertainment in a cozy atmosphere.
restaurant_bellagio.longDescription: Bellagio Club-Restaurant is an ideal place for those who value quality rest, delicious cuisine, and pleasant atmosphere. Here you can spend an unforgettable evening enjoying fine drinks and dishes.

conference_service.title: Conference Service
conference_service.description: Professional conference hall for business events for up to 80 people.
conference_service.longDescription: Our 100 m² conference hall is equipped with modern multimedia equipment. Ideal for seminars, workshops, and presentations with coffee break options.

cta.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Vacation?
cta.description: We are waiting for you in Kamianets-Podilskyi. Book your room today and get a free breakfast as a gift!

hero.title: Gallery

hero.title: Stay Rules
hero.description: Important information for Gala Hotel guests about stay order, services, and entertainment.

stay.title: Hotel Stay Order
stay.bedding: Bed linen change — once every 3 days (for stays over 3 days)
stay.towels: Towel change — on guest's request (daily, during routine cleaning)
stay.responsibility: Guest bears financial responsibility for hotel property
stay.checkout_process: On checkout, the room is handed over to the maid or administrator
stay.parking_luggage: Parking, luggage storage, and clothes ironing — free for residents

free_services.title: Free for Guests
free_services.breakfast: Breakfasts (included in price, can be declined)

paid_services.title: Additional Services
paid_services.restaurant: Restaurant and bar (10% discount for hotel guests)

cta.title: Have additional questions?
cta.description: Our staff works 24/7 to ensure your comfort. Contact the reception at any time.

hero.description: Professional venue for seminars, workshops, and business meetings in Kamianets-Podilskyi.

intro.title: Your Success Starts with the Right Place
intro.description: We offer conferences, seminars, and training sessions on the territory of Gala Hotel Complex. The Bellagio club-restaurant hall is equipped with all necessary technology, allowing you to focus on the most important — your knowledge and experience.

equipment.title: Technical Equipment
equipment.desc: Modern projectors, screens, and sound systems for your presentation.

accommodation.title: Guest Accommodation
accommodation.desc: Participants can comfortably stay in Gala Hotel rooms.

catering.title: Catering
catering.desc: Organization of coffee breaks, lunches, and receptions of any complexity.

leisure.title: Leisure
leisure.desc: Large territory for nature walks after the workday.

pricing.title: Hall Rental Cost
pricing.note: * Discuss necessary equipment and settings with our technical staff in advance.

nature.title: Learning in Harmony with Nature
nature.description: On the territory of Gala Hotel Complex, participants will be able to not only participate in learning but also rest in nature. We recommend conducting training sessions away from the office bustle so that participants can feel free and better absorb new information.

cta.title: Plan Your Conference Today
cta.description: Our staff will be happy to help organize the event, meals, and rest for your colleagues.

hero.title: Weddings at Bellagio
hero.description: Your perfect 'turnkey' wedding in the heart of Kamianets-Podilskyi.

intro.title: Creating Your Fairytale Together
intro.description: A wedding is a special day, and we know how to make it unforgettable. Our team of professionals takes care of all organization chores so you can enjoy every minute of your holiday. From fine menu to drive show — we have everything for an ideal event.

banquet.title: Banquet Hall
banquet.desc: Spacious and elegant hall adaptable to any wedding style.

menu.title: Menu and Catering
menu.desc: Fine dishes of European and Ukrainian cuisine from our chefs.

organization.title: Turnkey Organization
organization.desc: We will help with every detail so you don't worry about small things.

finance.title: Budget and Features
finance.note: * We allow bringing your own alcohol, drinks, and fruits without any additional fees.

cta.title: Book Your Date
cta.description: Contact our administrator for detailed consultation and hall viewing.

hero.title: Galactica Bowling Club
hero.description: The only bowling club in Kamianets-Podilskyi for the whole family, friends, and corporate competitions.

intro.title: 100% Rest!
intro.description: Galactica Bowling Club is the only place in town where you can play this exciting game. Here you can really rest 100%! Galactica has all conditions for people of any age. You can play bowling with family, friends, or colleagues, as this game has no limits — children, adults, men, and women can play it.

service.title: Rules and Service
service.description: The game is played in special shoes available at the bowling reception. We provide free instructor services and individual ball selection throughout the game.

kids.title: For the Youngest
kids.description: A special children's program is installed for players from 5 years old. One lane can accommodate from 1 to 8 people at a time.

cosmic.title: 'Cosmic' Lighting
cosmic.description: From 22:00, the bowling works with special ultraviolet lighting, creating a unique holiday atmosphere.

hall.title: Lounge Hall
hall.description: A game table is installed at each lane, allowing you to combine play with ordering dishes from the restaurant or bowling menu.

pricing.title: Lane Rental Price List
pricing.subtitle: (number of players from 1 to 8 people)
pricing.note: * On weekends and holidays, the 'Saturday' rate applies. Socks are not included in the lane rental price.

hero.title: Auto Camping
hero.description: The only auto camping in Kamianets-Podilskyi on the picturesque territory of the hotel complex.

intro.title: The Only Auto Camping in Kamianets-Podilskyi
intro.description: Haven't you thought about taking a break from work and grey weekdays and going for a couple of days to dive into the picturesque views of the Old Fortress castles. Our hotel offers auto camping on a beautiful park zone territory of 1.2 hectares.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Picturesque views and fresh air in the heart of the city.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.description: All necessary communications for your motorhome.

leisure.title: Entertainment and Leisure
leisure.description: In the evenings, you can rest in city night clubs and discos. Sports and extreme entertainment, as well as exciting excursions, are offered for adults.

pricing.title: Rental Cost
pricing.description: Get comfort, security, and best city views for an affordable price.

hero.title: Leisure and Entertainment
hero.description: A variety of opportunities for active leisure, relaxation, and unforgettable emotions on the territory of Gala Hotel Complex.

intro.title: Your Leisure at Gala Hotel
intro.description: We offer our guests not just accommodation but a whole world of entertainment. From the drive of Galactica bowling club to calm recovery at the mineral water well.
intro.description_2: Whether you travel with family or came for sports competitions, on our 1.2-hectare territory, there is an ideal place for your rest.

galactica.title: Galactica Entertainment Center
galactica.description: Spend unforgettable time with friends or family. We offer flexible rates for bowling and sports field rental. Our bar will provide you with drinks and snacks during the game.

events.title: Special Events
events.description: Want to organize team competitions or a children's holiday? We will help conduct any event with professional accompaniment and holiday atmosphere.

hero.description: Effective work and full-fledged rest in the conference hall of Gala Hotel complex.

intro.title: Space for Your Ideas

equipment.title: Technical Equipment
equipment.description: Rental price already includes all necessary equipment for a professional event.

food.description_2: Full-fledged meals from our chefs will ensure participants' good mood and help better absorb new information.

pricing.title: Rental Cost
pricing.subtitle: Transparent and flexible conditions for every client.
pricing.note: * Payment form and rental conditions are agreed individually.

hero.title: Poirot Restaurant
hero.description: Sophisticated combination of European and Ukrainian cuisine in the very heart of our hotel complex.

intro.title: Memorable Taste
intro.description: Poirot Restaurant invites you to dive into the world of gastronomic pleasure. We masterfully combine traditions of Ukrainian hospitality with the refinement of European and Mediterranean cuisine. Each dish is a piece of art created with love by our chefs.

halls.description: Choose the ideal space for your event. Each hall has its unique atmosphere and opportunities for celebration.

main.name: Main Hall
main.description: Perfect for birthday celebrations, corporate events, dinner with friends, baptisms, or romantic dinners.

cta.title: Planning an Event?
cta.description: Contact our administrator to discuss details of your holiday and book the best hall.

hero.title: Bellagio Club-Restaurant
hero.description: Universal space for large-scale celebrations and business events in Kamianets-Podilskyi.

atmosphere.title: Cuisine and Atmosphere
atmosphere.p1: Bellagio club-restaurant is located on the territory of Gala Hotel Complex. We offer a combination of European, Mediterranean, and Ukrainian cuisine dishes.
atmosphere.p2: Our two-level banquet hall can accommodate up to 250 people (150 seats on the first level and 100 seats on the second), making it the largest and most technological venue in the city.

pricing.title: Menu and Prices
pricing.description: We offer diverse meals: from breakfasts (buffet) to refined banquet dishes from the chef. Our team will help compose an ideal menu for your holiday.

breakfast.title: Breakfasts
breakfast.description: For guests staying at Gala Hotel, breakfast (buffet) is included in the room rate. Start your morning deliciously!

offers.0: Weddings and outdoor ceremonies in Gala Hotel park
offers.4: Discos and theme parties with DJ
offers.5: Concerts — professional stage and equipment for artists

hero.title: Wood-fired Sauna
hero.description: Real wooden bathhouse for your health and ideal rest in Kamianets-Podilskyi.

intro.title: Traditions of Recovery and Relaxation
intro.description: Correct procedure of using dry steam is a way as old as the world and surprisingly effective to relax, rest, recover, and gain strength. Our sauna is built using traditional technology from natural wood, giving a soft and clean wood smell from the first seconds of stay.

comfort.title: Everything for Your Comfort
comfort.description: We have created all conditions for you to get real pleasure. The sauna has everything necessary for useful and unforgettable rest.

special.label: Special Offer
special.title: 10% Discount for Hotel Guests
special.description: For all residents of Gala hotel complex, there is a permanent discount for sauna visits. Rest profitably and usefully!

hero.title: Sport and Extreme
hero.description: Active leisure in Kamianets-Podilskyi: from morning jogs in the park to extreme rafting and BRDM rides.

city_intro.title: Rest in the 'Stone Flower'
city_intro.description: Kamianets-Podilskyi is one of the oldest cities in Ukraine, where unique natural and cultural-historical monuments are combined. Rest here will become an unforgettable adventure in your life, as the city offers not only history but also many opportunities for active leisure.
city_intro.history_desc: Be sure to visit the Old Castle, Peter and Paul Cathedral, Turkish Bridge, and Stefan Batory Tower. Enjoy the beauty of Smotrych Canyon and the magic of flooded Bakota.

reasons.0: Center of festival life: military-historical reconstructions and Retrofest
reasons.2: Unique historical monuments: Old Castle and Turkish Bridge
reasons.3: Picturesque canyons of Smotrych and Dniester rivers
reasons.4: Atlantis cave — second most beautiful gypsum cave in Europe
reasons.5: Flooded city of Bakota and rock cave monastery

park.title: RUNNING IN PARK ZONE
park.description: Large park zone near Gala Hotel is ideal for morning jogs that improve health and mood.

football.title: MINI FOOTBALL FIELD
football.description: Field with artificial grass (30*15m) for football and basketball. Outdoor gym machines are nearby.

tennis.title: LAWN TENNIS
tennis.description: Professional court to maintain tone, develop reaction and strategic thinking.

kayaking.title: KAYAK RAFTING
kayaking.description: Unforgettable trips along Smotrych, Dniester, Zbruch, and Zhvanchyk rivers. Full camping gear and treats.

boat.title: BOAT AND STEAMSHIP
boat.description: Walks along canyons, fishing, water skiing, wakeboarding, and underwater hunting.

brdm.title: EXTREME ON BRDM
brdm.description: Rides on modernized military vehicle through swamps and hills. Real drive for a group!

sport_extreme.activities_subtitle: Only relevant and safe entertainment for our guests

expeditions.title: Rafting and Expeditions
expeditions.description: We have all necessary gear for rafting accompanied by professional instructors. We organize evenings by the campfire with most delicious fish soup and baked fish.

cta.title: Want to Book Entertainment?
cta.description: Contact our administrator to agree on time and cost of individual tours.

hero.title: Tennis Court 'Gala Tennis'
hero.description: Lawn tennis school for children and adults on the territory of Gala Hotel in Kamianets-Podilskyi.

intro.title: Welcome to 'GALA TENNIS' Lawn Tennis School
intro.description: Lawn tennis school for adults and children in Gala Hotel complex in Kamianets-Podilskyi is an ideal place for active leisure and sports development. Play for your pleasure, learn or train for competitions on our professional court.

rules.title: Important to Know
rules.label: Court Rules
rules.description: Only players in special shoes are allowed on the court. This ensures preservation of the surface and players' safety during the game.

history.label: History Pages
history.title: From Ancient Times to Our Days
history.p1: First mentions of a game similar to tennis can be found in 12-13th centuries in Italy. The game was called 'jidoko', and the ball was hit with a glove, wooden shield, or leather belt put on the hand. Officially, tennis appeared in the 14th century on the territory of modern France. French nobility was fond of so-called 'palm game' ('jeu de paume'), which greatly influenced modern tennis development.
history.p2: Tennis was brought to Ukraine in 1890 by English merchants who created tennis clubs in Odesa and Taganrog. Later tennis spread to other cities of Ukraine. Tennis was included in the Olympic Games program in 1896, excluded in 1928, and only in 1988 recognized as an Olympic sport again.

cta.title: Book Time on Court Today!
cta.description: We are waiting for you daily from 08:00 to 22:00. Rent a court or join our tennis school.

hero.title: Corporates at Bellagio
hero.description: Professional organization of holidays for your team in the city's best club-restaurant.

intro.title: Rest that Strengthens the Team
intro.description: A corporate event is not just an excuse to rest, but an opportunity to get to know each other better and feel part of a whole. Whether it's a company birthday, professional holiday, or New Year — we will make your event unforgettable.

details.title: What Do We Offer?
details.description: We offer organization and conducting of your holiday in the large hall of Bellagio club-restaurant. Great cuisine, drive atmosphere, and professional service at reasonable prices await you.

cta.title: Plan Your Dream Corporate
cta.description: Contact our administrator for cost calculation and hall booking.
cta.location: Poirot / Bellagio restaurant, Gala Hotel complex

hero.title: Family Holidays
hero.description: Anniversaries, birthdays, and baptisms — creating unforgettable memories for your family.

intro.title: A Holiday that Stays in Your Heart
intro.description: An anniversary or birthday is a special moment when closest people gather. We will make sure this day becomes a pleasant memory. We also offer best active leisure in Kamianets-Podilskyi for your whole group.

christenings.title: Baptism of Your Baby
christenings.description: This is first of all a sacrament, so everything must be solemn and beautiful! We will create a cozy atmosphere of a family holiday, provide a comfortable area for feeding the baby, and ensure professional service.
christenings.quote: “We are chosen for high service levels and reasonable prices!”

hero.title: Mineral Water Well
hero.description: Therapeutic table water 'Old Fortress' of 'Naftusia' type directly from our own well on the hotel territory.

intro.label: Did You Know?…
intro.title: Well No. 30
intro.description: Well No. 30, drilled in 1988, is located directly on the territory of Gala Hotel complex. In 2004, the mineral water was named 'Old Fortress'. By its properties, it is therapeutic table water of 'Naftusia Zbrucha' type.

items.0: Sulfate-hydrocarbonate magnesium-calcium of low mineralization (1.3 - 2.2 g/dm³).
items.2: Odorless, colorless, fresh to taste, without accompanying gases.

composition.title: Chemical Composition
composition.bio_active_desc: Iron, Bromine, Iodine, Arsenic, Orthoboric and Metasilicic acids, organic substances.

therapeutic.title: Therapeutic Properties
therapeutic.description: Many years of observation by leading medical specialists proved that taking 'Old Fortress' water allows consolidating the effect of drug therapy and significantly prolong the remission period.

items.0: Diuretic effect, removal of small stones and sand
items.1: Activation of bile formation and bile secretion
items.2: Promotion of radionuclides removal from organism

opinions.title: Expert Conclusions
opinions.quote: “Mineral water intake allows conducting therapy using fewer medications and makes disease remission longer.”

cta.title: Feel the Healing Power of Nature
cta.description: Our well is open to all hotel guests. Learn more about the wellness course from our administrator.

hero.title: Children's Attractions and Leisure
hero.description: A world of joy and safe entertainment for your children on the territory of Gala Hotel complex.

intro.title: Happy Childhood and Merry Rest
intro.description: We know how important it is for children to have space for active games and new discoveries. Our territory is equipped so that your little ones can safely play, run and get positive emotions every day.
intro.description_2: We offer various options for children's leisure, where each child will find an activity to taste — from quiet games to active fun.

atmosphere.title: Space for Family Moments
atmosphere.description: While your children are busy with a fun game, you can enjoy the peace of our park or taste delicious dishes in the restaurant nearby. We have created all conditions for family rest to be comfortable for everyone.
atmosphere.walking: Plenty of space for walks in the fresh air

events.title: Children Holidays
events.description: Want to organize a bright birthday for a child? Our territory and professional service will help make this day special and filled with happy smiles.

The spacious and bright Bellagio restaurant hall is an ideal option, equipped with modern light-sound technology and a large separate stage, raised above the hall level and equipped with wing curtains. The hall, decorated in theater style, will create an atmosphere of special solemnity.

concerts.gallery_hint: Scroll to view stage and hall
